sqlMap.select: select * from PolicySOI where TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and SOITypeKey = #SOITypeKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into PolicySOI(TransactionSequence, PolicyKey LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp SOITypeKey ) values (#TransactionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #SOITypeKey# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('PolicySOI') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select SOISequence, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, TransactionSequence, PolicyKey, SOITypeKey from PolicySOI where SOISequence = #SOISequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update PolicySOI set
LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null SOITypeKey = #SOITypeKey# SOITypeKey = null
where SOISequence = #SOISequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from PolicySOI where SOISequence = #SOISequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from PolicySOI where TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and SOITypeKey = #SOITypeKey#
sqlMap.select: select SOISequence, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, TransactionSequence, PolicyKey, SOITypeKey from PolicySOI where SOISequence = #SOISequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select SOISequence, TransactionSequence, PolicyKey, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from PolicySOI where TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and SOITypeKey = #SOITypeKey#
